case_title: MING LEE AKA PEARL PERFETTO VS. NAVEEN SINGHA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MING LEE AKA PEARL PERFETTO AS TO DEFENDANT SINGHA, NAVEEN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MING LEE AKA PEARL PERFETTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGHA, NAVEEN AN INDIVIDUAL $22,773.70 PRINCIPAL, $71.85 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,215.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
